scripts.build:bin: mkdir -p dist && bun build --target bun --compile --outfile dist/attack-shark-cli cli/index.ts && chmod +x dist/attack-shark-cli
scripts.build:esm: mkdir -p dist && bun build --target bun --format esm --outfile dist/attack-shark-cli.mjs cli/index.ts
scripts.compile: bun run clean && bun run build:bin && bun run build:esm
scripts.package: bun clean && bun compile && bun copy-extension && bun copy-cli
